source: workers/api.js ensureSchemaUncached legacy schema creates for pre-migration application tables; excludes RC1 test-only fixture schema and excludes production row data.
relationshipToMigrations: Apply legacy-base-schema.sql first, then versioned migrations/0004+ in lexical order to create database/expected/migration-schema.* and provision empty staging databases.
knownDifferencesFromCurrentProduction: Production baseline is not captured in this PR; compare with database/baseline/production-baseline.json only after authenticated read-only D1 capture.
The bootstrap intentionally omits columns added by versioned migrations such as student_access.plan and *_student_id.
